description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that runs on push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: build-openbios on ubuntu-latest that checks out code, cancels previous runs, and builds OpenBIOS; macos-build-and-test on macOS-latest that installs dependencies, builds pcsx-redux, and downloads OpenBIOS; and publish-app on ubuntu-latest that installs Node.js, downloads the app build, performs binary fixups, and distributes the app to App Center.
